title: SΔϕ-05 - Agency as Recursive Transition Law Update

core_claim: Agency is not free will, consciousness, personhood, legal responsibility, or mere tool use. Agency is recursive transition law update: path generation, path selection, execution, environmental effect, feedback reception, transition law update, and recursive continuity.

primary_formulae.expanded: Agency = Path Generation + Path Selection + Execution + Environmental Effect + Feedback Reception + Transition Law Update + Recursive Continuity
primary_formulae.agency_pipeline: input -> path generation -> path selection -> execution -> effect -> feedback -> transition law update

do_not_use_as: agency proof from tool use alone
